cells.rationale: Cross-cutting architectural seam: the TranscriptReader contract and registry both sibling readers build on, plus a behavior-preserving CLI grammar flip across the largest surface of the epic, is a nameable multi-file cascade warranting opus at the contract-introduction band.

Bounded single-file reader implementation against the established task-1 seam with a named reference to re-express and a fully-specified entry mapping, well within sonnet's literal-implementation sweet spot at the model-default band.

The hardest reader with subtle but fully-specified rules (top-level-timestamp ordering, event_msg dedup, encrypted-reasoning exclusion, meta backfill) is literal execution against a detailed spec, so sonnet at xhigh for the edge-case density rather than escalating the model.
